question.label: Workload specifics
question.name: When you say 'so much work', what specifically is taking up the most time right now?
question.description: Drills into the workload specifics to identify stress points.

answer: doing all the tickets for the backend stuff is very hard.

assessment.note: Describes workload as very hard — signals strain on wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Backend workload
new_queue.name: When you say 'doing all the tickets for the backend stuff is very hard', what's making it hard — volume, complexity, or something else?

new_queue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?

new_queue.name: How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side, especially in terms of cross-team interactions?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Specific feedback
new_queue.name: Could you share an instance where communication with the UX team was particularly challenging?
